creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
amdmi3      2009-05-06 23:25:15 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils             Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/flashrom    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  flashrom is a utility for reading, writing, verifying and erasing flash ROM
  chips. It's often used to flash BIOS/coreboot/firmware images.
  
  It supports a wide range of DIP32, PLCC32, DIP8, SO8/SOIC8, TSOP32, and
  TSOP40 chips, which use various protocols such as LPC, FWH, parallel flash,
  or SPI.
  
  WWW: http://www.coreboot.org/Flashrom
  
  PR:             134267
  Submitted by:   Alexander Logvinov <ports at logvinov dot com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1103    +1 -0      ports/sysutils/Makefile
  1.1       +33 -0     ports/sysutils/flashrom/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/sysutils/flashrom/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/sysutils/flashrom/pkg-descr (new)
